title: JV-09 - Model manifest, download, checksum, license, and consent flow

labels.name: priority:P0
labels.description: Must-have for the first usable product increment

labels.name: level: atomic
labels.description: Small independent execution slice that can be assigned directly

labels.name: area: privacy
labels.description: Privacy, retention, consent, and local data protection

body:
## Summary

Create the pinned model bundle manifest and install/consent flow for the chosen local MT model.

## Why is this needed?

A default local provider needs reproducible model install, checksums, license attribution, and consent records before runtime use.

## Current context

This WBS comes from tentacle research on 2026-05-21. Current repo state: mt_provider still defaults to google; src/bin/mt_bench.rs emits a pending lf-04-v1 fixture; local OPUS-MT provider exists behind local-mt but lacks benchmark-proven realtime replacement evidence; config has explicit mt_cloud_fallback consent; #372 closed with routing/fixture only; #383 tracks 60fps render performance; PR #407 aligns docs with local-first STT but does not make local MT default.

## Inputs

- Chosen model from JV-08.
- Existing model_download.rs and local bootstrap consent code.
- Current opus_mt_ja_vi_consent_manifest scaffold.

## Outputs

- Pinned manifest with file URLs, SHA-256, sizes, model ID, version, license, and source revision.
- Install command or onboarding path for local MT bundle.
- Consent re-prompt on model version/license changes.

## Implementation approach

- Reuse resumable download and checksum infrastructure.
- Pin immutable release assets, not mutable HuggingFace main URLs.
- Optionally sign manifest with embedded public key.
- Do not download when offline mode is set.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Installer validates every file hash and size before accepting model.
- [ ] Missing/failed model surfaces actionable ModelNotFound or ChecksumMismatch.
- [ ] Consent record includes model ID, version, license, and timestamp.
- [ ] No path traversal or untrusted file overwrite is possible.

## Test cases / evidence gates

- [ ] Manifest parser and checksum tests.
- [ ] Offline-mode no-socket test.
- [ ] Path traversal rejection.
- [ ] Consent fresh/stale tests.
- [ ] Disk-space preflight test.

## Dependencies

- Depends on JV-08 candidate decision.
- Can begin manifest shape earlier using OPUS-MT assumption but final URLs wait for JV-08.

## Agent routing

Build: provider/local specialist. Review: tui-security-auditor and tui-rust-code-reviewer.

## Project / WBS

- WBS key: JV-09
- Wave: P1 platform
- Project target: magicpro97/project/2
- Labels: type: feature, area: providers, area: config, area: privacy, provider: local, priority:P0, level: atomic

## Duplicate / extension note

Extends LF-01/local model cache work and #372; creates the real MT bundle path.
